message:
🌱 Add kube-ovn: [Feature Request] Move vlan interfaces under ovs and create mission (#943)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kube-ovn-5756-feature-request-move-vlan-interfaces-under-ovs-and-create-internal",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kube-ovn: [Feature Request] Move vlan interfaces under ovs and create internal vlan interfaces",
+    "description": "[Feature Request] Move vlan interfaces under ovs and create internal vlan interfaces. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kube-ovn deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your kube-ovn version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kube-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kube-ovn\nhelm list -n kube-system 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working kube-ovn installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kube-ovn configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kube-ovn configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kube-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kube-ovn\nkubectl get configmap -n kube-system -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kube-ovn\n```\nCurrently, when creating a ProviderNetwork that specifies a master interface (e.g., bond0), Kube-OVN moves the physical interface to an OVS bridge and transfers its IP configuration."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Feature Request] Move vlan interfaces under ovs and create\u2026",
+        "description": "# Pull Request\n\n## What type of this PR\n- Features\n- Docs\n- Tests\n\n## Which issue(s) this PR fixes\n```yaml\napiVersion: kubeovn.io/v1\nkind: ProviderNetwork\nmetadata:\n  name: net1\nspec:\n  defaultInterface: bond0\n  # New field to enable VLAN sub-interface handling\n  preserveVlanSubinterfaces: true\n  # Optional: explicit list of VLAN IDs to preserve\n  vlanSubinterfaces:\n    - 10\n    - 20\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kube-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kube-ovn\nkubectl get events -n kube-system --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[Feature Request] Move vlan interfaces under ovs and create\u2026\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "# Pull Request\n\n## What type of this PR\n- Features\n- Docs\n- Tests\n\n## Which issue(s) this PR fixes",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: kubeovn.io/v1\nkind: ProviderNetwork\nmetadata:\n  name: net1\nspec:\n  defaultInterface: bond0\n  # New field to enable VLAN sub-interface handling\n  preserveVlanSubinterfaces: true\n  # Optional: explicit list of VLAN IDs to preserve\n  vlanSubinterfaces:\n    - 10\n    - 20",
+        "apiVersion: kubeovn.io/v1\nkind: ProviderNetwork\nmetadata:\n  name: eth0\nspec:\n  defaultInterface: eth0\n  preserveVlanInterfaces: true",
+        "41: br-eth0: <BROADCAST,MULTICAST,UP,LOWER_UP> mtu 1500 qdisc noqueue state UNKNOWN group default qlen 1000\n    link/ether 52:95:05:0e:0a:58 brd ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff\n    inet 10.9.111.161/16 brd 10.9.255.255 scope global noprefixroute br-eth0\n       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever\n    inet6 fd74:ca9b:3a09:868c:10:9:111:161/64 scope global noprefixroute\n       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever\n    inet6 fe80::5095:5ff:fe0e:a58/64 scope link\n       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever\n42: br-eth0-vlan10: <BROADCAST,MULTICAST,UP,LOWER_UP> mtu 1500 qdisc noqueue state UNKNOWN group default qlen 1000\n    link/ether 76:e0:e3:6b:49:6c brd ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff\n    inet 192.168.110.11/24 brd 192.168.110.255 scope global br-eth0-vlan10\n       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever\n    in"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
